verification_summary: Supabase migration list has one local/remote baseline: 20260702000000

global_rules.hidden_means: If a section/page/feature is marked hidden, it must have no visible navigation/link entry and must not be directly accessible by URL to any user unless explicitly re-approved.
global_rules.done_means: Done requires current main + live VPS or live DB evidence. Old branch reports are secondary evidence only.
global_rules.auth_checks: Protected-route 200 after redirect to /auth is not feature verification. Authenticated checks require successful login and the target page body. Current QA seed logins failed during this audit, so authenticated UI proof is limited to code/tests/reports unless stated otherwise.
global_rules.owner_decisions: Product/legal/manual-QA items are not complete until Badma/Alex/legal owner gives a decision. They can be documented but not marked fixed.

issue_groups.rule: Anything hidden must be fully hidden and URL-inaccessible to all users.

issues.title: Hide public sections 'Направления' and 'Экскурсии' completely
current_evidence: Live homepage returns 200 but still contains navigation text for Экскурсии / Направления in the header/body extraction.
Public /destinations and /listings routes exist in the build and should be treated as accessible until disabled/removed.
Prior audit only proved homepage section hiding, not full URL inaccessibility.
required_to_close: Remove all nav/menu/footer links to hidden sections.

Make direct URLs inaccessible: /destinations, /destinations/[slug], /listings, /listings/[id], /listings/[id]/book, or any equivalent excursion/direction route must return 404/redirect to allowed page for every user unless explicitly re-approved.
Add route or navigation tests proving hidden routes are not public.
Verify live VPS by HTTP/body after deployment.

issues.title: Remove fine print under homepage request form
issues.how_done: Homepage copy was changed in prior Wildberries batches; current source/build no longer depends on that old small print as a required line.
required_to_close: Recheck visually after the hidden-route cleanup because the homepage/nav still needs work.

issues.title: Optimize /become-a-guide copy; remove duplicate/unrealistic blocks
issues.how_done: Current live /become-a-guide does not contain 'Зарабатывайте на авторских экскурсиях' or 'Большая часть дохода — вам'.
evidence: Live /become-a-guide returned 200 and text scan passed for those removed phrases.
issues.remaining: Final content approval is still a product/content sign-off if Badma wants exact wording.

issues.title: Remove/approve blue info-box text on /auth?role=guide
issues.how_done: Auth copy was rewritten; current live /auth?role=guide does not contain the old confusing phrases checked in the audit.
evidence: Live /auth?role=guide returned 200; old confusing copy strings were absent.
issues.remaining: Badma can still approve final marketing wording.

issues.title: Guide signup requires valid phone; phone signup works
issues.how_done: Phone validation/sign-up flow was fixed and duplicate normalized phone enforcement exists in DB.
evidence: profiles.phone_normalized + unique index present in live baseline
issues.remaining: Authenticated/manual signup flow can be re-run after QA login credentials are restored.

issues.title: Duplicate phone cannot be reused for a second account
issues.how_done: Live DB has generated normalized phone column and uniqueness enforcement after duplicate remediation.

issues.title: Add 3 guide types in signup
issues.how_done: Guide type selector exists on /auth?role=guide with Individual guide / agency representative / guide team labels.
evidence: Live /auth?role=guide text scan found all three guide-type options.

issues.title: Persist guide type and show it in profile/admin
issues.how_done: Migration added guide_profiles.guide_type and code reads it in guide profile/admin detail.
evidence: Current build includes guide_type source references
issues.remaining: Authenticated visual recheck requires working QA login.

issues.title: Clarify guide type vs legal status/documents
issues.how_documented: Tracked as product distinction, not an engineering bug.
required_to_close: Badma/Alex decide exact UX labels and whether legal form must be separate from guide type.

issues.title: Guide registration form needs explicit Back/Home navigation
issues.how_done: Current /auth?role=guide shows 'На главную'.
evidence: Current source src/app/(auth)/auth/page.tsx has На главную
Live text scan found guide form, but earlier probe against stale worktree missed it; current main has it.
required_to_close: Optional: visual screenshot from live after hidden-route cleanup.

issues.title: After guide registration go to verification/profile, not inbox
issues.how_done: Signup routing was changed to land guides on /guide/profile.
evidence: MVP finish report verified new guide registration reaches profile
issues.remaining: Re-run live signup manually after QA credentials/test account policy is restored.

issues.title: 'Пройти верификацию' should open top of questionnaire, not bottom
issues.how_done: Links changed away from bottom #verification anchor for the entry point.
issues.remaining: Authenticated visual recheck when QA login works.

issues.title: Guide profile first block / 'О себе' save fails due to specialization constraint
issues.how_done: DB constraint was realigned to canonical specialization slugs and profile save was verified in prior live report.
evidence: Live baseline contains corrected guide_specializations constraint
MVP finish report verified bio/theme save and checklist flip.

issues.title: Final verification submit button / all-or-nothing questionnaire
issues.how_done: Completion gate requires full questionnaire before final submit; partial verification behavior addressed.
evidence: MVP finish report verified disabled submit for incomplete new guide and checklist behavior.

issues.title: Document status should not confusingly show draft after upload
issues.why_not_done: The source issue is authenticated and document-upload-specific. No current live authenticated visual proof exists in this audit because QA login failed.
required_to_close: Login as guide
Upload/check document state
Verify owner-facing label is understandable and not misleading.

issues.title: Guide profile save button overlaps text on narrow/mobile layout
issues.how_done: MVP finish pass reports 375px guide profile layout had no save-button overlap.
issues.remaining: Capture fresh mobile screenshot on current live once QA guide login works.

issue_groups.group: Traveler request, account, navigation, and booking

issues.title: Calendar selectable for anonymous and logged-in traveler
issues.how_done: Calendar/date picker fixes were shipped and tested; MVP finish report verified logged-in traveler request submission.
issues.remaining: Manual recheck recommended after any hidden-route/nav changes.

issues.title: Traveler request MVP fields
issues.how_done: Request form aligned to MVP fields: place, date, time, people, price per person, languages, optional details.

issues.title: Remove confusing traveler profile readiness widget from /account
issues.how_done: Account page no longer renders the old traveler profile readiness block for the main account page; old helper remains in code for other profile completion contexts/tests.
issues.remaining: Authenticated /account visual check needs working QA login.

issues.title: Second blinking cursor outside field
issues.why_not_done: No deterministic code proof or live visual proof found. Could be browser/OS/input artifact.
required_to_close: Reproduce in same browser/device
Capture before/after screenshot or mark not reproducible with evidence.

issues.title: Clarify purpose/path of /account page
issues.why_not_done: This is a product/navigation explanation issue, not purely a bug.
required_to_close: Decide whether /account stays and where it is linked from
Update copy/nav accordingly.

issues.title: Logout must not redirect to localhost
issues.how_done: Signout route safe redirect was fixed and tested in PR #250.
issues.remaining: Authenticated live logout check after QA login works.

issues.title: Account page tautology / duplicate headings
issues.how_done: Account page copy was simplified in PR #250.
issues.remaining: Authenticated live check after QA login works.

issues.title: Avatar menu confusing items and duplicate notifications
issues.how_done: Navigation tests ensure notification/trips duplication is removed from account drawer/menu surfaces.
issues.remaining: Visual menu recheck optional after login works.

issues.title: Request detail breadcrumb 'Поездки > Россия > Москва' confusing/not clickable
issues.how_done: Breadcrumb/action behavior was changed/reported as clickable.
issues.why_partial: The wording/meaning of 'Поездки' may still need UX owner approval.
required_to_close: Owner decides label
Live request-detail visual recheck with sample request.

issues.title: Full booking/payment scenario
issues.why_not_done: MVP finish report explicitly says booking/payment happy path was implemented but not exercised end-to-end.
required_to_close: Create safe test guide/listing/request
Approve or use demo-safe flow
Accept offer
Create booking/payment agreement
Verify traveler and guide surfaces.

issues.title: Admin /admin/guides must not crash
issues.how_done: Admin guides queue was hardened; route is protected and redirects to auth when unauthenticated, not public-crashing.
issues.remaining: Authenticated page-body verification requires working QA admin login.

issues.title: Admin must see/manage all users/guides, not only review queue
issues.how_done: Admin users console was merged in PR #250 and included in current deployed build.
issues.remaining: Authenticated admin UI visual proof requires working QA login.

issues.title: Admin deletion/blocking/suspend/archive tool
issues.how_done: Admin account actions include suspend/archive/role change; hard delete is demo-only and guarded.
issues.remaining: Authenticated visual check after QA login works.

issues.title: Clean demo/test requests and accounts
issues.how_done: DB reset/cleanup left no traveler requests/bookings in live DB at audit time.
issues.note: A clean DB means some visual/content checks need new seeded demo data before they can be verified.

issues.title: Define own/service accounts and QA credentials policy
issues.why_not_done: QA seed logins failed during this audit, so the current credential/account policy is not operationally clear.
required_to_close: Create documented QA/admin/traveler/guide seed account policy
Verify login succeeds without exposing passwords in repo/state.

issue_groups.group: Legal, catalog data, feature policy, and infra

issues.title: Tripster-style offer / liability allocation
issues.why_not_done: Current live /policies/offer returns 404 and current main build route table does not include /policies/offer. Earlier reports described a draft route on a branch, but it is not present in the deployed main audited now.
required_to_close: Restore/add /policies/offer route
Mark clearly as legal draft if not lawyer-approved
Add footer/sitemap link if approved
Verify live 200/body text.

issues.title: Soften absolute accredited-guide claim
issues.how_done: Homepage wording is softer and no longer says the platform works only with accredited guides as an absolute universal claim.
evidence: Live homepage text scan found accreditation wording but not the absolute 'работает только с аккредитованными' phrase.

issues.title: Public /guides catalog should load/display guides
issues.how_done: Route no longer hard-crashes and search_guides RPC executes.
issues.why_partial: Live DB currently has 0 approved guides and search_guides_count = 0, so this audit cannot prove guide cards render with real data.
required_to_close: Seed or approve at least one guide
Verify /guides displays card(s) on live.

issues.title: Contact visibility as guide feature
issues.why_not_done: Documented as Badma/product feature decision, not a bug. The route exists but is protected.
required_to_close: Badma decides keep/gate/remove
If hidden, make it inaccessible per global hidden rule.

issues.title: vps6.provodnik.app does not work / choose canonical test URL
issues.how_done: Canonical tester URL is vps.provodnik.app. vps6 is not treated as target.

issues.title: Manual verification after fixes
issues.why_not_done: Automated and report evidence exists, but final Alex/Badma human sign-off was not found in the source set.
required_to_close: Run a guided manual checklist against live VPS
Record sign-off or remaining comments in this state file.

next_actions_ordered.details: Fully remove/invalidate public Directions/Excursions surfaces: no nav links and direct URLs inaccessible for every user unless re-approved. This is currently the strongest gap because the user clarified hidden means fully hidden/inaccessible.

next_actions_ordered.action: Restore/add legal offer route or mark it explicitly out of scope
next_actions_ordered.details: /policies/offer is 404 on current live main despite prior reports saying a draft existed.
QA admin/traveler/guide login attempts failed during audit, blocking authenticated visual proof.

next_actions_ordered.action: Re-seed/approve a guide for /guides display proof
next_actions_ordered.details: Route/RPC are healthy but live DB has zero approved guides, so guide-card rendering is unproven.
Check document status wording, stray cursor, account page UX, admin user console, logout redirect, and full booking/payment path after QA accounts work.

do_not_recheck_group_unless: A state.json item lacks source/evidence and cannot be answered from repo/live checks.
Owner asks for historical phrasing or exact screenshot context not captured here.
